# UICellAccessory.OutlineDisclosureOptions.Style.cell

**Case**

The style to use for a selectable cell with nested children.

## Declaration

```swift
case cell
```

## Discussion

When using this style, a tap on the outline disclosure accessory toggles the expansion state of the item. A tap on the cell selects the item itself.

## Constants

- **UICellAccessory.OutlineDisclosureOptions.Style.automatic**: The system automatically determines the style depending on whether the cell’s configuration is as a section header.
- **UICellAccessory.OutlineDisclosureOptions.Style.header**: The style to use for a section header.
